rows.description: Computus Gu: Paynter Rectory a secundo die
rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Adopted gpt-5-mini's capitalization for 'Gu:' as it's clearer in the image. This is a page title.
Consensus on all values. This is a page date header.

rows.description: Imprimis reddidit comput: de remanentib: in lista 11 9 46
rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Adopted gpt-5-mini's transcription of 'Imprimis' as visually more accurate. Both correctly identified the trailing numbers as part of the description, not monetary amounts.
Consensus on all values. Clear section header.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription of description and amounts. Visual inspection confirms 'Guinear' and '60' for pounds. Shillings and pence are clearly '0 0'.

Visually verified amounts as 76 pounds, 13 shillings, 4 pence (matching gpt-5-mini). Description 'Longwitnam' from gemini-flash appears slightly more accurate upon closer inspection of the 't' vs 'h'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription of amounts as '20 0 0', confirmed by visual inspection. The '1' reading from gemini-flash is incorrect. Adopted gpt-5-mini's capitalized description.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription for description format and amounts. Visual inspection confirms '30' pounds, and the parenthetical 'pro mici' is a good representation for the annotation.
Selected gpt-5-mini's extraction. Visual inspection confirms there are no amounts for 'Merton' on this line; the amount columns are blank.

Selected amounts '03 00 8q' from gpt-5-mini. Visual inspection confirmed the 'q' represents 0.25 fraction. Used gemini-flash's description 'Chocchill' as visually more accurate. gemini-flash incorrectly identified no amounts for this row.
Selected gpt-5-mini's extraction. Visual inspection confirms no amounts for 'Thrup'; the amount columns are blank. gemini-flash incorrectly reported amounts.
Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Adopted gemini-flash's 'Due' as visually more accurate than 'Jue'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's amounts and description. Visual inspection clearly shows '02 15. 7' aligned with 'Ralph marshally capons'. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned amounts from a different row.
Selected gpt-5-mini's extraction. Visual inspection confirms no amounts for 'Calcott'; the amount columns are blank. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned amounts belonging to the previous row.
Consensus on all values. Visually confirmed '03 8 11' for Bampton.
Consensus on all values. Visually confirmed '04 0 0' for Mountague.
Selected gpt-5-mini's amounts, visually confirmed '01 12 0' for Hughes. gemini-flash incorrectly reported no amounts.
Selected gpt-5-mini's amounts, visually confirmed '00 10 0' for Greeneway. gemini-flash incorrectly reported amounts belonging to the previous row.
Selected gpt-5-mini's amounts, visually confirmed '00 15 0' for Walker. gemini-flash incorrectly reported amounts belonging to the previous row.
Selected gpt-5-mini's extraction. Visual inspection confirms no amounts for 'Minne'; the amount columns are blank. gemini-flash incorrectly reported amounts belonging to the previous row.
Consensus on all values. Visually confirmed no amounts for Leaden-hall.
Consensus on all values. Visually confirmed no amounts for Molineux.

Adopted gpt-5-mini's description format to include the brace. Visually verified amounts as '02 5 5'. Adopted gemini-flash's interpretation of '3q' as 0.75, which is visually plausible after the pence amount. gemini-flash had the wrong pounds/shillings split (0 pounds, 2 shillings) while gpt-5-mini correctly read the main digits as '2 5 5'.

This row was correctly identified and extracted by gpt-5-mini as a separate entry under the 'Tintinhull' brace. gemini-flash incorrectly combined this with the 'Napper' entry. Visual inspection confirms '01 18.7' for Hopkins.
Selected gpt-5-mini's amounts, visually confirmed '03 19 8' for Clifton Ferry. gemini-flash incorrectly reported no amounts.
Selected gpt-5-mini's amounts, visually confirmed '01 15 6' for Bensington. gemini-flash incorrectly reported amounts belonging to the previous row.

Visual inspection confirms no amounts for 'Brew house'; the amount columns are blank. Both extractors incorrectly assigned amounts to this row (gemini-flash assigned amounts from Bensington; gpt-5-mini duplicated Bensington's amounts).
Consensus on all values. Visually confirmed '06 9 7' for Trethewin.
Consensus on all values. Visually confirmed no amounts for Merton Vicar.
Consensus on row type and amounts. Adopted gemini-flash's full description, which correctly includes the subscripted word 'nedoploriem'.
